tagline: Reliable 24/7 Plumbing Services in Austin, TX
headline: Expert Austin Plumbing – Ready When You Need Us
subheadline: From emergency leaks to routine maintenance, Mike’s Plumbing provides professional, trustworthy service across the Austin area.

features.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
features.description: We're available day or night to handle your plumbing emergencies.

features.title: Austin Local
features.description: Proudly serving the Austin community with local expertise.

features.title: Expert Repairs
features.description: Licensed professionals for all your plumbing needs, big or small.

about: Mike's Plumbing has been a staple in the Austin community, built on a foundation of trust and professional excellence. We specialize in fast, reliable plumbing solutions for residential and commercial clients alike.

servicesPage.intro: Comprehensive plumbing solutions tailored to your home or business.

items.title: Leak Detection & Repair
items.description: Fast identification and fix for hidden leaks to prevent water damage.

items.title: Drain Cleaning
items.description: Clearing stubborn clogs and maintaining your drainage system.

items.title: Water Heater Service
items.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance for all water heater types.

items.title: Fixture Installation
items.description: Professional upgrades for your kitchen and bathroom fixtures.

aboutPage.story: Founded by Mike, a master plumber with over 15 years of experience, we started with a single truck and a commitment to honest service. Today, we remain family-owned and dedicated to the same Austin neighborhoods where we began.
aboutPage.mission: To provide every Austin resident with high-quality, dependable plumbing services while maintaining the highest standards of integrity.
